settings.title: Signs you feel in the body and in the world
Numbers that follow you
settings.description: 11:11 on the clock. 22:22 before sleep. 3:33 when you wake up. It's not your brain playing tricks on you — it's a code someone is using to get your attention.

settings.title: Coincidences that leave you speechless
settings.description: You think of someone and they write you in that second. You talk about something and it appears in front of you. Those synchronicities aren't noise — they're direct messages you don't yet know how to read.

settings.title: Animals choose you
settings.description: Birds landing near you. Cats that won't leave. Butterflies appearing at key moments. Animals sense a frequency you're emitting without knowing.

settings.title: Objects that appear on their own
settings.description: Feathers on your path. Coins where they shouldn't be. Stones that catch your eye. They appear just when you need them most — and no, it's not your imagination.

settings.title: An inner voice that won't go quiet
settings.description: You feel something guiding you but you can't explain what. A silent certainty pushing you toward certain decisions — even when logic says otherwise.

settings.title: Emotional signs you can no longer ignore
You know things without knowing how
settings.description: You have hunches that always come true. You know who's calling before looking at your phone. Your intuition is more powerful than you let yourself believe.

settings.title: You feel too much — and it drains you
settings.description: You get emotional about things others don't register. You feel the energy of places, people, situations. That's not weakness. It's a gift you haven't learned to use yet.

settings.title: You are ready for something that doesn't yet have a name
settings.description: You feel there's something bigger waiting for you, but you don't know what form it takes. That restlessness isn't anxiety — it's your next level calling you.

settings.title: You look for answers where no one else looks
settings.description: You read things your friends don't. You search in places others ignore. You feel the answer is close but you can't quite grasp it yet.

settings.title: Something big is about to happen
settings.description: You feel it in the body. In the chest. In the skin. Something tells you your life is about to change — and this time it is serious.

settings.title: When the weight you carry needs a Guardian
You carry energy that isn't yours
settings.description: You absorb others' pain. You always give more than you receive. You get exhausted without knowing why. A Guardian doesn't take your burden away — it helps it not crush you.

settings.title: You need something to take care of you
settings.description: Protection, clarity, or a profound change. If you feel something is missing that you can't buy anywhere — maybe it's not a thing. Maybe it's a someone.

settings.title: The signs that brought you here
settings.intro: If you are on this page, something brought you. It wasn't the algorithm. It wasn't chance. Something inside you recognizes what you are about to read.
settings.cta_text: If you nodded along to more than three, your Guardian is already looking for you. All that's left is for you to open the door.
